title: World Cup 2026 Group I guide - fixtures, schedule, standings and odds for France, Senegal, Iraq and Norway
original_text: World Cup Group I features 2022 runners-up France, Senegal, Iraq and Norway. More World Cup group guides: Group A | Group B | Group C | Group D | Group E | Group F | Group G | Group H | Group J | Group K | Group L World Cup Group I fixtures All kick-off times are BST World Cup Group I table World Cup Group I supercomputer prediction World Cup Group I stats France guide France fixtures All kick-off times are BST Tuesday June 16: France 3-1 Senegal - New Jersey, USA Monday June 22: France vs Iraq , kick-off 10pm - Philadelphia, USA Friday June 26: Norway vs France , kick-off 8pm - Massachusetts, USA France squad Goalkeepers: Mike Maignan (AC Milan), Robin Risser (Lens), Brice Samba (Rennes). Defenders: Lucas Digne (Aston Villa), Malo Gusto (Chelsea), Lucas Hernandez (PSG), Theo Hernandez (Al Hilal), Ibrahima Konate (Liverpool), Jules Kounde (Barcelona), Maxence Lacroix (Crystal Palace), William Saliba (Arsenal), Dayot Upamecano (Bayern Munich). Midfielders: N'Golo Kante (Fenerbahce), Manu Kone (AS Roma), Adrien Rabiot (AC Milan), Aurelien Tchouameni (Real Madrid), Warren Zaire-Emery (PSG). Forwards: Maghnes Akliouche (Monaco), Bradley Barcola (PSG), Rayan Cherki (Man City), Ousmane Dembele (PSG), Desire Doue (PSG), Jean-Philippe Mateta (Crystal Palace), Kylian Mbappe (Real Madrid), Michael Olise (Bayern Munich), Marcus Thuram (Inter Milan).
